prompt: Can you audit the JWT handling in this FastAPI service and grade it?

assertions.name: states-audit-depth
assertions.text: Report states it audited at standards level rather than pattern level because the stack is not JS/TS (with-skill run only)

assertions.name: finds-fallback-secret
assertions.text: Report flags the os.environ.get('JWT_SECRET', 'inventory-service-secret') fallback default in app/auth.py

assertions.name: no-stack-mismatch-noise
assertions.text: No Node/axios-specific rules are reported as failures against the Python code

assertions.name: credits-good-practices
assertions.text: Report acknowledges the pinned algorithm, checked issuer/audience, and httpOnly cookie as done well
